scripts.kill:5000: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$connections = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($connections) { $connections | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; exit 0"
scripts.dev:backend: npm run kill:5000 && npm run dev --prefix backend
